description_long: This is a standard 20 fl oz (591 mL) Dr Pepper soda can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a vibrant red background and white, silver, and black accents. The front prominently displays the Dr Pepper logo in white script within a circular badge, accompanied by the number '23' and stylized cherry graphics. The can is covered with fine dot patterns and includes a vertical football seam graphic, suggesting a sports-themed promotion. Nutritional facts, a barcode, and recycling information are printed on the back, while the top is sealed with a typical pull-tab opening. The surface is metallic, glossy, and smooth, with clear branding and promotional text visible from multiple angles.
description: A red, metallic Dr Pepper soda can with bold branding, sports-themed graphics, and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: This view shows the Dr Pepper logo, part of the promotional text, and the barcode on the left side.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the vertical football seam graphic and the '1 IN 6 WINS' promotional banner.
description_view_2: This side displays the Dr Pepper logo, promotional text, and the start of the nutrition facts panel.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the nutrition facts panel, barcode, and recycling information.
attribute_brand_logo: The Dr Pepper logo is prominently displayed on the front, featuring white script text inside a circular badge with a red background and silver accents.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can displays the Dr Pepper logo and the number '23', but no explicit flavor indication is visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, ingredients, and other nutritional information.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A '1 IN 6 WINS' promotional banner and a vertical football seam graphic are visible, indicating a sports-themed contest or offer.
